summary: Engineering Manager with over 10 years of experience in IT. I specialize in QA & Test Automation Strategy, AI-driven Testing, and LLM Evaluation. Passionate about effective communication and mentoring, helping others grow their careers in IT.

experience.title: Engineering Manager
responsibilities: Creating and implementing quality strategies (Master Test Strategy) for product teams (web, mobile, API)
Innovative approaches to testing - LLM-as-a-judge strategy, Promptfoo, evaluating AI model responses
Collaborating with SRE and product teams to ensure high-quality services
Managing the QA team and developing competencies in automation and AI-driven testing

experience.title: Head of Quality Assurance
responsibilities: Team management: skills development, mentoring, and work organization
QA Guild coordination: developing internal practices and promoting a culture of quality
Designing and optimizing quality assurance processes
Supervising manual and automated testing processes
Managing the recruitment process for the QA team

experience.title: Quality Assurance Specialist
responsibilities: First person in the company in a QA role
Building a quality culture in the organization

education.degree: Bachelor of Management and Production Engineering

certifications.name: Human Leader in Feedback with Impact

publications.title: Shift Left Done Right: QA in the Modern SDLC
From Cypress to Playwright - Saleor's Voyage
